br_description: List, restore and convert backups to the current storage format.
br_confirm_msg:
Restore backup from {date}?

Format: {format}

Current data will be backed up first, then overwritten.
The application will restart afterwards.

Continue?
br_no_backup_selected: Please select a backup from the list or choose a folder.
br_backup_not_valid: The selected folder does not contain a recognizable backup.
br_no_backups_found: No backups found in backup folder.
br_hint_select: Select a backup from the list or click 'Browse folder…'.
